status.searching_news: Dang tim kiem nguon tin tuc...
status.searching_papers: Dang tim kiem nguon hoc thuat...
status.answer_ready: Cau tra loi da san sang.
status.fetching_publisher: Dang tai bai tu nha xuat ban...
status.resolving_gn: Dang xu ly lien ket Google News...
status.rewriting_korean: Dang viet lai bang tieng Han...
status.preparing_rewrite: Dang chuan bi viet lai day du...
status.extracted_rewriting: Da trich xuat noi dung bai viet — dang viet lai...
status.viewing_prior: Dang xem luot truoc — dat cau hoi tiep theo ben duoi.

error.no_answer: Khong tao duoc cau tra loi AI — ket qua tim kiem ben duoi.
error.no_news: Khong tim thay tin tuc — thu truy van khac.
error.no_stories: Khong tim thay bai viet — thu truy van khac.
error.no_stories_category: Khong tim thay bai viet cho danh muc nay — thu danh muc khac.
error.rewrite_empty: Viet lai bai viet tra ve van ban trong.
error.rewrite_failed: Khong the viet lai bai viet
error.load_news_failed: Khong the tai tin tuc — kiem tra may chu.
error.model_not_found: Khong tim thay mo hinh — chay ollama pull cho mo hinh da cau hinh, hoac chon mo hinh khac trong Tuy chon.
error.ollama_not_running: Ollama khong chay — cau tra loi chi tu tim kiem. Khoi dong: ollama serve

preferences.title: Tuy chon
preferences.language_desc: Chọn ngôn ngữ giao diện ưa thích
preferences.language_storage: Ngôn ngữ giao diện được lưu trong trình duyệt.
preferences.branding_desc: Tuy chinh ten ung dung, logo va favicon hien thi trong giao dien.
preferences.app_name_hint: Ten hien thi trong header va tieu de trang
preferences.logo_url_hint: URL hoac duong dan den anh logo (de trong cho mac dinh)
preferences.favicon_url_hint: URL hoac duong dan den favicon (de trong cho mac dinh trinh duyet)
preferences.appearance_desc: Customize the visual style and layout.
preferences.search_desc: Cai dat mac dinh ap dung cho tat ca cac tim kiem.
preferences.ui_language_hint: Ngon ngu giao dien (luu trong localStorage trinh duyet)
preferences.search_language_hint: auto = tu dong nhan dien tu truy van (Hangul → ko-KR); hoac all, hoac locale co dinh nhu ko-KR
preferences.fallback_language_hint: Duoc su dung khi tu dong nhan dien khong chac chan
preferences.results_per_engine: Ket qua moi cong cu tim kiem
preferences.ai_desc: Cau hinh mo hinh AI de tong hop cau tra loi va viet lai bai viet.
preferences.ai_api_key_hint: Required for cloud providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
preferences.ai_model_hint: Mo hinh chat/huong dan de tong hop cau tra loi va mo rong truy van
preferences.ai_article_model_hint: Mo hinh de viet lai bai tin tuc toan trang (mac dinh la mo hinh chinh)
preferences.ai_timeout_hint: Thoi gian cho moi yeu cau goi mo hinh
preferences.engines_desc: Bat/tat cong cu tim kiem va dieu chinh trong so xep hang. Trong so cao hon = anh huong nhieu hon den thu tu ket qua.
preferences.privacy_desc: Control how your data is handled.
preferences.proxy_images_hint: Route images through server to hide your IP from third parties
preferences.remove_trackers_hint: Strip UTM and other tracking parameters from URLs
preferences.save_history_hint: Store searches locally in browser (never sent to server)
preferences.shortcuts_desc: Quick access keys for power users.
preferences.advanced_desc: Cai dat bo nho dem va thoi gian cho.
preferences.cache_ttl_hint: Thoi gian song cua bo nho dem ket qua (0 tat bo nho dem)
preferences.request_timeout_hint: Thoi gian cho mang moi cong cu tim kiem
preferences.saved_msg: da ghi vao settings.yml va ap dung cho cac tim kiem moi.
preferences.server_settings: Cac cai dat nay duoc luu tren may chu tai
preferences.ai_answer_top_n_hint: Number of results for answer synthesis

footer.grounded_answers: Cau tra loi co can cu tu mo hinh cuc bo cua ban — khoang 46 cong cu tim kiem, khong ghi nhat ky truy van.
footer.academic_papers: Bai bao hoc thuat tu arXiv, OpenAlex, Crossref, Europe PMC, Semantic Scholar, DOAJ, va hon nua.
footer.news_digest: Tom tat tin tuc: lay trang bai viet, viet lai tom tat cuc bo qua Ollama — chi hinh anh lon, khong phong to favicon.
footer.images: Tim kiem hinh anh Wikimedia Commons — hinh thu nho duoc proxy de bao mat.

briefing.anchor_intro: Xin chào, tôi là Hera Kim. Dưới đây là những tin tức nổi bật hôm nay.
briefing.anchor_outro: Đó là tất cả cho bây giờ. Tôi là Hera Kim. Chúc bạn một ngày tuyệt vời.
